title: Senja + Lyngen
tagline: Senja then Lyngen without the Andenes ferry. Built around two alpine heroes: Blåisvatnet and a Steindalsbreen / north-coast viewpoint day.
anchors: Leave Senja via Finnsnes — no Gryllefjord→Andenes ferry
Hero: Steindalsbreen approach or northern Lyngen viewpoints

overnight.name: Near Brensholmen ferry quay
overnight.alt_campsite: Utsikten Bobil Camping (near Brensholmen / Sommarøy road)

notes.text: Same soft start as Option A.
Stock up in Tromsø — Senja shops are fewer on Sunday.

optional.notes: Extends the Grøtfjord stop — easy stroll before Brensholmen

scenarios.when: Prefer a bookable / facilities campsite instead of wild overnight
scenarios.summary: Sleep Utsikten Bobil Camping (showers/power) near Brensholmen — still an easy morning run to the ferry quay.

overnight.name: Utsikten Bobil Camping
overnight.price: 300 NOK / night pitch for the van (Park4Night / guest reports; VIPPS or cash on-site)

waypoints.name: Overnight Utsikten Bobil Camping
waypoints.price: 300 NOK / night pitch for the van (Park4Night / guest reports; VIPPS or cash on-site)

notes.text: Same soft start as Option A.
Stock up in Tromsø — Senja shops are fewer on Sunday.
Utsikten Bobil Camping is the named motorhome pitch north of the quay (VIPPS / on-site pay; no online booking). ~5–10 min to Brensholmen in the morning.

overnight.name: Camp Mefjord, Mefjordvær
overnight.price: ≈325–440 NOK / night pitch for the van (2026 reports; confirm on booking)

ferry.price: 247 NOK / van ≤6 m (our 5.99 m; 2026; AutoPASS/FerryPay; passengers free)

notes.text: Same soft Senja arrival as Option A.
Protect evening light at Tungeneset if the sky opens.

optional.notes: Short boardwalk / shore path to the light at the north tip — easy village linger after the ferry; park before the bridge if the island is tight.
Clear evening priority
Calm sea only — not with evening Tungeneset
Easy ~30–45 min hill from the football-field / trail parking — fjord and village panorama; good evening walk from Camp Mefjord.

scenarios.summary: Take the next Sunday sailing (12:15). Senja afternoon compresses — keep Tungeneset if light allows.

replace.title: Late ferry to Senja → northern coast (compressed)

ferry.season_note: Missed 10:15 — next useful Sunday departure from Brensholmen is 12:15 (~35 min).

notes.text: Sunday backup after 10:15 is 12:15 (then 17:00).
Skip kayak; shorter Tungeneset if daylight remains.
Still sleep Mefjordvær — Lyngen schedule holds.

optional.notes: Short version — only if you arrive with daylight

scenarios.summary: Cut exposed coast walks; Hamn sauna; still leave for Lyngen on schedule.

notes.text: Skip kayak / long boardwalk.
Sleep Mefjordvær anyway — Lyngen heroes are still ahead.

optional.notes: Best grey-day use of Senja

notes.text: Photo stops from the van only.
Still leave toward Lyngen on Day 4 as planned.

scenarios.when: Prefer wild overnight instead of Camp Mefjord
scenarios.summary: Sleep the Tungeneset Scenic Route parking after evening light — no showers; morning starts from the viewpoint.

notes.text: Same soft Senja arrival as Option A.
Protect evening light at Tungeneset if the sky opens.
Wild overnight at Tungeneset parking — allemannsretten / rest-area etiquette; Camp Mefjord remains the facilities fallback.

overnight.name: Hamn i Senja / south coast scenic
overnight.alt_campsite: Finnsnes Feriesenter (showers before the Lyngen transfer)

notes.text: Linger on the Scenic Route spine — Bergsbotn, Ersfjordstranda, then Hamn. Bøvær is an optional fishing-village beach detour (no ferry-queue pressure today).
Sleep Hamn; cross to mainland tomorrow via Finnsnes.

optional.notes: NTV lists Bøvær as a detour off the Scenic Route — white sand / fishing village; easy to add without a ferry queue today
Iconic Senja peak (~3.5 h / steep ridge) — harder than Hesten; clear dry weather only. Pick Segla OR Hesten, not both.
Best classic Segla photo angle — steep near the top; clear weather only. Pick Hesten OR Segla, not both.
Best calm-water session of the Senja leg

fallback.when: Sea too rough for kayak / SUP

optional.notes: Evening ritual before leaving Senja
Steep ~2–2.5 h above Hamn with coast views — skip if wet/slippery on the final scramble; chain section near the top.

scenarios.when: Prefer a campsite instead of wild overnight near Hamn
scenarios.summary: After Hamn, continue to Finnsnes Feriesenter for showers/power — already on tomorrow’s transfer spine.

overnight.name: Finnsnes Feriesenter
overnight.price: 370 NOK / night pitch for the van (incl. electricity; feriesenter.org — no person fee published)

waypoints.name: Overnight Finnsnes Feriesenter
waypoints.price: 370 NOK / night pitch for the van (incl. electricity; feriesenter.org — no person fee published)

notes.text: Linger on the Scenic Route spine — Bergsbotn, Ersfjordstranda, then Hamn. Bøvær is an optional fishing-village beach detour (no ferry-queue pressure today).
Enjoy Hamn, then drive on to Finnsnes Feriesenter (~45–60 min) for showers before the Lyngen transfer.

ripple.banner: Campsite alt — start from Finnsnes Feriesenter

notes.text: Already near Finnsnes — grocery in town, then Breivikeidet ferry toward Lyngen.
Evening: short coastal walk near Lyngseidet, early night before hero hike.

overnight.alt_scenic: Fjellveggen / fjord pull-offs west of Lyngseidet
overnight.price: ≈250 NOK / night pitch with electricity (guest-reported; confirm for 2)

ferry.note: Frequent sailings (~hourly daytime). No booking needed for cars/campers usually.
ferry.price: 104 NOK / van ≤6 m (our 5.99 m; 2026; AutoPASS/FerryPay; passengers free)

notes.text: Transfer day — leave Hamn early, grocery in Finnsnes.
Evening: short coastal walk near Lyngseidet, early night before hero hike.

optional.notes: Pull over for peaks/fjord light — no long hike

scenarios.summary: Wait for the next ~hourly sailing (+1 h). Drop linger photo stops; still sleep Lyngseidet.

ferry.season_note: Missed the planned Breivikeidet sailing — next useful daytime crossing ~+1 h.

notes.text: These Ullsfjord ferries run often — stay at the quay, do not loop away.
Skip roadside linger; cook and sleep early at Lyngseidet.

scenarios.when: Prefer wild overnight instead of Fastdalen Grendehus
scenarios.summary: Sleep a fjord-side parking west of Lyngseidet (toward Svensby) — no facilities; still reach Blåisvatnet tomorrow.

waypoints.name: Overnight fjord pull-off west of Lyngseidet

notes.text: Transfer day — leave Hamn early, grocery in Finnsnes.
Wild overnight west of Lyngseidet (Kjosveien fjord parking — named stand-in for the vague “Fjellveggen” hint). Fastdalen Grendehus remains the facilities default.

ripple.banner: Wild alt — start west of Lyngseidet

overnight.name: Olderdalen / Kåfjord scenic overnight
overnight.alt_campsite: Løkvollstranda Camping in Manndalen (~10 min south of Olderdalen)

ferry.note: Cross after the morning hero walk. Frequent daytime sailings.
ferry.price: 152 NOK / van ≤6 m (our 5.99 m; 2026; AutoPASS/FerryPay; passengers free)

notes.text: HERO #1: Blåisvatnet short walk in clear weather (turn back early — stay under ~5 km).
Afternoon ferry to the east shore for a different angle on the Alps.
Nordmannvik / roadside glacier views for the evening.

optional.notes: Clear-weather hero — keep it short; full circuit is optional, not required

then.notes: Skip the walk; ferry views become the day

optional.notes: If cloud eats the lake — warm up before the ferry
Easy ~1–1.5 h to the canyon bridge (from upper valley parking shorter) — east of Olderdalen toward Birtavarre; gravel road; clear weather preferred.

scenarios.summary: Wait ~+1 h for the next sailing. Keep Blåisvatnet if already done; cut east-shore linger.

ferry.season_note: Missed Lyngseidet → Olderdalen — next daytime sailing ~+1 h.

notes.text: Stay at the quay after the lake walk — sailings are frequent.
Skip Nordmannvik linger; sleep Olderdalen as planned.

optional.notes: Still do this if weather is clear — ferry wait comes after

scenarios.summary: Skip hero hikes; keep ferries and fjord driving — cafés, short roadside stops, earlier campsites.

replace.title: Ferry to east Lyngen (no lake hike)

notes.text: Cloud on the glacier lake = skip the walk entirely.
Use the ferry crossing as the ‘view’ of the day.
Nordmannvik only if rain eases.

optional.notes: Wait out a shower before boarding

notes.text: Skip glacier approach in cloud.
Easy photography from the van; early campsite.

optional.notes: Rain day anchor

scenarios.when: Prefer a campsite instead of wild overnight near Olderdalen

notes.text: HERO #1: Blåisvatnet short walk in clear weather (turn back early — stay under ~5 km).

Showers and power at Løkvollstranda — reserve when you can.
